needs_client_action.title: Interview Michael for internal feedback
needs_client_action.reason: Overdue task since March 12 to capture internal success stories for marketing.

needs_client_action.title: Fill out Q2 planning checklist
needs_client_action.reason: Necessary to align our strategy for the upcoming quarter.

needs_client_action.title: Prepare data and slides for March 24th Zoom session
needs_client_action.reason: Confirm if this session was completed or if assets are still needed for a recording/recap.

client_overdue.title: Create a Reddit account
client_overdue.action_needed: Setup account for organic strategy discussed on March 5.

strategic_direction.title: Social Proof Amplification
strategic_direction.reasoning: With Red Fortress recently ranked #1 in Fort Myers, we need to move the 'Blog post regarding #1 property management ranking' from agreed to done and syndicate this across the new Reddit/LinkedIn channels.

strategic_direction.title: Formalize Email Marketing Service
strategic_direction.reasoning: We are currently drafting 'Raise Hand' and 'Webinar' emails as one-offs. Transitioning this to a full 'email-marketing' service will ensure consistent lead nurturing beyond single events.

strategic_direction.title: Paid Ads Performance Recovery
strategic_direction.reasoning: Last meeting noted rising lead costs due to Google algorithm changes. A formal audit and activation of the 'paid-ads' service can stabilize these costs before they hit industry benchmarks.

suggested_agenda.notes: Celebrate the ranking and discuss how to leverage it for social proof.
Address GHL sync, April emails, and the Reddit account setup.

suggested_agenda.topic: Strategic Focus: Stabilizing Ad Costs & Q2 Planning
suggested_agenda.notes: Discuss the rising lead costs and the Q2 planning checklist.
Review the proposed projects for the next month.

projected_roadmap.title: Rank #1 Hero Case Study PDF
projected_roadmap.what: Creation of a high-end downloadable case study detailing the methodology that led Red Fortress to the #1 spot in Fort Myers. Includes graphic design and lead capture setup.
projected_roadmap.why_now: Capitalizes on the momentum of the recent property management ranking and provides a high-value 'lead magnet' for the upcoming April 'Raise Hand' emails.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 4 hours for copywriting and 3 hours for design.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Provide any internal data or quotes that contributed to the ranking success.
projected_roadmap.impact: Increases trust and conversion rate for new leads by providing tangible proof of expertise.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: Mike, that #1 ranking is a huge badge of honor. I'd love to turn that into a formal case study PDF we can use as a lead magnet. It’ll give us something high-value to offer in the April emails and prove your authority right out of the gate.

projected_roadmap.title: Google Ads 'Efficiency' Audit & Re-optimization
projected_roadmap.what: A deep-dive technical audit into the current ad account to combat rising CPCs. This involves search term scrubbing, landing page speed checks, and bid strategy adjustments.
projected_roadmap.why_now: In our March 5th huddle, we noted lead costs were creeping up due to Google's algorithm changes. We need to nip this in the bud before it affects the overall ROI.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 6 hours for the audit and implementation of immediate 'negative keyword' optimizations.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Brief review of the findings to ensure targeting remains aligned with high-quality lead criteria.
projected_roadmap.impact: Expected to lower the cost per lead (CPL) and improve lead quality by filtering out the 'bad leads' Mike mentioned tracking.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: We noticed in the last report that Google's changes are starting to push your lead costs up. I want to run a focused efficiency audit to clean up the traffic and pull those costs back down to your usual benchmarks.

projected_roadmap.title: Automated Webinar Evergreen Sequence
projected_roadmap.what: Building an automated workflow in GoHighLevel that takes the recording of the March 24th Zoom session and turns it into a permanent 'on-demand' webinar funnel.
projected_roadmap.why_now: You’ve already done the work for the March 24th session. By syncing this with GoHighLevel (which is currently an open task), we can turn that one-time event into a 24/7 lead generator.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 5 hours to set up the automation, landing page, and email triggers.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: Provide the final video recording of the Zoom session.
projected_roadmap.impact: Creates a scalable, passive source of leads and nurtures them without manual intervention.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: That property tax Zoom session was great content. Instead of it being a one-and-done, let's turn it into an evergreen funnel in GoHighLevel so it keeps generating leads for you while you're focused on the coaching.

talking_points.Provide March Zoom session topic: Great news, Mike—we got the March Zoom topic finalized and that's already checked off the list.
talking_points.Interview Michael for internal feedback: Mike, do you have a window this week for that internal feedback interview? I want to make sure we're capturing the 'secret sauce' behind your #1 ranking.
talking_points.Draft April Raise Hand emails: Bill is finishing up the April Raise Hand drafts; we'll have those over for your eyes shortly to stay ahead of the month.
talking_points.Google Ads 'Efficiency' Audit & Re-optim: I'm keeping an eye on those rising Google costs we discussed—I'd like to do a quick efficiency audit to make sure we aren't overpaying for those leads.
talking_points.Automated Webinar Evergreen Sequence: Since you did the heavy lifting on the property tax session, I want to pitch turning that recording into an evergreen funnel so it works for you in the background.
